rationale.R1.6: The revised text maintains a clear and concise writing style, with some minor improvements in polish.
rationale.RX.1: The output accurately discloses uncertainty through calibrated qualifiers and caveats.
rationale.RX.3: The output is mostly within scope, covering the three benchmark panels as requested.

rationale.RX.5: The output provides some provenance and traceability through citations to previous work, although not all non-cosmetic changes are annotated with source and reason.
